# Foxglove

> Foxglove is an open-source observability platform for robotics that lets engineers visualize, debug, and collaborate on robot data including ROS 1, ROS 2, MCAP, Protobuf, and custom formats — through a web-based and desktop application.

## About

- [Homepage](https://foxglove.dev): Product overview, customer stories, and platform capabilities
- [About](https://foxglove.dev/about): Company background and team
- [Why Foxglove](https://foxglove.dev/why-foxglove): Value proposition and competitive differentiation
- [Proposition Guide](https://foxglove.dev/why-foxglove/proposition-guide): Detailed positioning and use cases
- [Security](https://foxglove.dev/security): SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, AES 256-bit encryption
- [Careers](https://foxglove.dev/careers): Open positions
- [Contact](https://foxglove.dev/contact): Get in touch
- [Get a Demo](https://foxglove.dev/demo): Schedule a product demo

## Product

- [Product Overview](https://foxglove.dev/product): Core platform features — visualization, data management, analysis, extensibility
- [Visualization](https://foxglove.dev/product/visualization): 20+ customizable panels for point clouds, images, plots, maps, 3D scenes, and more
- [Data Management](https://foxglove.dev/product/data-management): Recording, ingestion, indexing, and retention for robotics data
- [Analysis](https://foxglove.dev/product/analysis): Search, replay, and debug recorded robot data
- [Foxglove Agent](https://foxglove.dev/product/agent): On-robot agent for data collection, upload, and remote monitoring
- [MCAP](https://foxglove.dev/product/mcap): Open-source container file format for multimodal robotics data
- [Extensibility](https://foxglove.dev/product/extensibility): Custom panels, message converters, topic aliases, and layout sharing
- [Integrations](https://foxglove.dev/product/integrations): ROS 1, ROS 2, MCAP, Protobuf, JSON, FlatBuffers, custom formats
- [Pricing](https://foxglove.dev/pricing): Free, Pro, Enterprise, and Academic plans
- [Download](https://foxglove.dev/download): Desktop app for Windows, macOS, and Linux

## Solutions by Industry

- [Autonomous Vehicles](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/autonomous-vehicles): Visualization and debugging for self-driving car development
- [Automotive](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/automotive): ADAS and autonomous driving development
- [Defense & Aerospace](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/defense-and-aerospace): Mission-critical robotics observability
- [Logistics & Supply Chain](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/logistics-and-supply-chain): Warehouse and fulfillment robotics
- [Manufacturing](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/manufacturing): Industrial automation and robotic arms
- [Construction & Mining](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/construction-and-mining): Heavy equipment autonomy
- [Agriculture & Forestry](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/agriculture-and-forestry): Autonomous agricultural robots
- [Marine](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/marine): Maritime and underwater robotics
- [Health & Wellbeing](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/health-and-wellbeing): Medical and wellness robotics

## Solutions by Robot Type

- [Autonomous Mobile Robot](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/autonomous-mobile-robot): AMR development and debugging
- [Humanoid Robot](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/humanoid-robot): Humanoid development workflows
- [Drone / UAV](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/drone): Aerial robotics data visualization
- [Autonomous Underwater Vehicle](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/autonomous-underwater-vehicle): Subsea robotics
- [Autonomous Surface Vehicle](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/autonomous-surface-vehicle): Surface marine vehicles
- [Quadruped](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/quadruped): Legged robot development
- [Autonomous Robotic Manipulation](https://foxglove.dev/solutions/autonomous-robotic-manipulation): Robotic arm and manipulation tasks

## Documentation

- [Docs](https://docs.foxglove.dev/docs): Full documentation site
- [API Reference](https://docs.foxglove.dev/docs/api): REST API documentation
- [CLI Reference](https://docs.foxglove.dev/docs/cli): Command-line interface
- [SDK](https://docs.foxglove.dev/docs/sdk/introduction): Foxglove SDK for live visualization, logging, and remote monitoring
- [Foxglove Agent Docs](https://docs.foxglove.dev/docs/foxglove-agent/introduction): Agent setup and configuration

## Robotics Resources

- [Foxglove vs RViz](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/foxglove-vs-rviz): Comparison with the ROS default visualizer
- [RViz vs Foxglove](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/rviz-vs-foxglove): Detailed feature comparison with RViz
- [Rerun vs Foxglove](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/rerun-vs-foxglove): Comparison with Rerun
- [RViz vs Foxglove vs Rerun](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/rviz-vs-foxglove-vs-rerun): Three-way comparison of robotics visualization tools
- [Best Rosbag Visualization Tools](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/the-best-rosbag-visualization-tools-in-2025): Guide to rosbag viewers
- [Best Tools for Rosbag Visualization](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/the-best-tools-for-rosbag-visualization-in-2025): Comprehensive tool comparison
- [Robotics Visualization Platforms](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/robotics-visualization-platforms-choosing-2025): How to choose a visualization platform
- [Data Management Tools for Robotics](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/data-management-tools-for-robotics-a-2025-guide-comparison): Guide to robotics data management
- [What is Robotics Data Management](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/what-is-robotics-data-management): Concept overview
- [What is Robotics Data Analysis](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/what-is-robotics-data-analysis): Concept overview
- [What is Multimodal Data Visualization](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/what-is-multimodal-data-visualization): Concept overview
- [What is Teleoperation](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/what-is-teleoperation): Concept overview
- [What is ROS](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/ros): Introduction to the Robot Operating System
- [What is URDF](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/urdf): Unified Robot Description Format explained
- [What is ROSBridge](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/rosbridge): ROSBridge protocol overview
- [What is PX4 ULog](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/px4-ulog): PX4 flight log format
- [Foxglove SDK Tutorial](https://foxglove.dev/robotics/foxglove-sdk-a-comprehensive-quick-start-tutorial): Quick-start guide

- [All Customer Stories](https://foxglove.dev/customers): Case studies from leading robotics companies
- [Shield AI](https://foxglove.dev/customers/shield-ai): How Shield AI transformed mission-critical development
- [Wayve](https://foxglove.dev/customers/wayve): How Wayve learns faster with Foxglove
- [Dexterity](https://foxglove.dev/customers/dexterity): How Dexterity saved hundreds of thousands in development costs
- [Scout AI](https://foxglove.dev/customers/scout-ai): Accelerating defense robotics foundation-model development
- [Saronic](https://foxglove.dev/customers/saronic): Autonomous surface vessel development
- [Waabi](https://foxglove.dev/customers/waabi): Autonomous trucking development
- [Aescape](https://foxglove.dev/customers/aescape): Wellness robotics
- [Greenzie](https://foxglove.dev/customers/greenzie): Autonomous lawn care
- [Chef Robotics](https://foxglove.dev/customers/chef-robotics): Food service automation
- [Simbe](https://foxglove.dev/customers/simbe): Retail inventory robotics
- [Yard Robotics](https://foxglove.dev/customers/yard-robotics): Outdoor autonomous logistics
- [Third Wave Automation](https://foxglove.dev/customers/third-wave-automation): Warehouse forklift autonomy
- [Reframe Systems](https://foxglove.dev/customers/reframe-systems): Construction robotics
- [Square Robot](https://foxglove.dev/customers/square-robot): Tank inspection robotics
- [Slip Robotics](https://foxglove.dev/customers/slip-robotics): Automated truck loading
- [CCOM](https://foxglove.dev/customers/ccom): Marine research
- [AIM](https://foxglove.dev/customers/aim): Autonomous inspection
- [Tangram Vision](https://foxglove.dev/customers/tangram-vision): Sensor fusion
- [Coco](https://foxglove.dev/customers/coco): Last-mile delivery
- [Polymath Robotics](https://foxglove.dev/customers/polymath-robotics): Fleet management
